title: Massive water saving
points: With our specially formulated solution we just use 500 mL of water to clean a mid size car (hatchback).
Saving atleast 20 liters of water with each wash
solution: Calculating it weekly CCUBE saved 40 liters of water and if annually 2080 liters of water is saved per car.

title: Helping the unorganized sector
points: We at CCUBE want to help those who need it most.
solution: We will be providing our employees with benefits like EPF and Mediclaim, so even the unorganized sector too could have a safe future and can experience better medical facilities.
